meta.title: The big problem with hypersonic missiles
meta.description:
According to the Pentagon, the hypersonic missiles in active development will cost as much as $106 million per unit... and that makes this pretty impractical for most targets. 
#shorts #airpower #hypersonic #hypersonics #hypersonicmissile #hypersonicmissiles #airdefense
